perspectives.description: The parent who has the responsibility to decide whether to share their child's achievement with the extended family, weighing the potential impact on their child's confidence.
The child who has just won the sports competition and is directly affected by the decision to share the news, as it could influence their confidence and feelings about their achievement.
A family member who may react negatively to the news of the child's achievement, potentially affecting the child's emotional well-being and the family dynamics.
